prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第79名，近年排名稳定在75–80区间，属于全国百强师范类高校；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无明显负面舆情冲击；抖音热度排名第70、评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度不高，报考关注度平稳；未见投档断档记录；心理学A+（全国顶尖）、马克思主义理论A、教育学A-、体育学A-，师范类学科实力突出，对有志于教育行业的考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范类、心理学等专业社会热度平稳；贵州省2026年高考总人数约29.9万，较2025年约29.73万略有增加，按近年物理类占比约69.7%估算，2026年物理类考生约20.84万人，较2025年20.72万人增加约1200人，竞争略有加剧；省控线2025年物理类本科批387分，较2024年380分上升，反映整体竞争水平提升；华南师范大学位于广东省广州市，属一线城市，对西南地区考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在贵州省招生规模稳定在24人左右，占比较小，跨省报考热度受地域偏好影响较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次整体后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、本省物理类考生小幅增加及省控线上移等因素，在2025年基准14691名基础上预计竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约14741名，区间14241–15241名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 9903 → 10209 → 12239 → 16934 → 14691, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform and batch merger, the ranking significantly shifted backward to 16934, but rebounded to 14691 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 2243 places in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 14691. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 21 in 2021, 25 in 2022, 25 in 2023, 27 in 2024, and 24 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 24, unchanged from 2025, with no impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 79th in 2026, with a stable ranking in the 75–80 range in recent years, belonging to the top 100 normal universities nationwide. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion impact. Douyin popularity ranking is 70th, with an average evaluation; short video platform exposure is not high, and application attention is stable. No record of enrollment gaps. Psychology is A+ (top in the country), Marxist Theory is A, Education is A-, and Sports Science is A-, with outstanding strength in normal disciplines, which has a sustained appeal to candidates aspiring to the education industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of majors such as normal education and psychology is stable. The total number of candidates in Guizhou Province for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 299,000, a slight increase from about 297,300 in 2025. Based on the recent proportion of physics category candidates at about 69.7%, it is estimated that there will be about 208,400 physics category candidates in 2026, an increase of about 1,200 from 207,200 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. The provincial control line for the 2025 physics category undergraduate batch is 387 points, up from 380 points in 2024, reflecting an overall increase in competition level. South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional appeal to candidates from the southwestern region. The university's enrollment scale in Guizhou Province is stable at about 24 people, accounting for a small proportion, and the cross-provincial application popularity is greatly influenced by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the overall backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight increase in provincial physics category candidates, and an upward shift in the provincial control line, competition is expected to intensify slightly from the 2025 baseline of 14691. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 14741, with a range of 14241–15241.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 14241–15241, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 14200), you can focus on aiming for flagship normal majors such as Psychology and Physics. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 15000), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
